title: sorghastrum contractum
intro: Sorghastrum contractum, also known as Indiangrass, is a type of warm-season grass that is native to the prairies of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Indiangrass include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Indiangrass can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
